incentiveApprovals.loadError: Could not load trips awaiting approval.
incentiveApprovals.queueEmpty: No delivered trips are waiting for approval.
incentiveApprovals.noneWaiting: No incentives are waiting for approval.
incentiveApprovals.awaiting: {{count}} delivered trip(s) awaiting approval — the incentive isn't paid until you approve the POD.
incentiveApprovals.editIntro: Proposed incentive: {{proposed}}. Leave the amount as-is to approve the proposal, or change it (a reason is required when you do).
incentiveApprovals.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. corrected pallet count on the DO

incentiveApprovals.reasonRequired: A reason is required when you change the amount.

approvals.noneWaiting: No accounts are waiting for approval.
approvals.awaiting: accounts awaiting approval — approving sets the account to active so the person can log in.
approvals.rejectBody: Reject {{name}} ({{role}})? The account is disabled and cannot log in until an admin re-approves it.

approvals.awaiting_other: accounts awaiting approval — approving sets the account to active so the person can log in.

users.passwordResetDone: Password reset. Share the new password securely.

consignees.importHint: Paste rows with a header. Required columns: Company, Zone. Optional: Contact, Phone, Area, State, Address 1/2, Postcode.
consignees.zoneChangeNote: Applies to future bookings only — completed trips keep their finalized pay.

performance.reliabilityHint: On-time delivery and trip completion — did the job land as planned?
performance.productivityHint: Volume of work delivered — trips, incentive points and distance this month.
performance.workloadHint: Trips completed this month per driver — spot an overloaded or idle driver at a glance.
performance.workloadNone: No trips have been completed yet this month — nothing to balance.
performance.workloadEven: Work is evenly spread — every driver completed {{count}} trip(s) this month.
performance.workloadImbalance: {{most}} is carrying the most this month ({{mostCount}} trips), while {{least}} has the fewest ({{leastCount}}). Consider rebalancing.

dashboard.mapSubLive_other: Zone overlays · {{count}} trucks live on GPS

drivers.leaveSub: On-leave drivers are skipped by dispatch; login stays active.
drivers.leaveEmpty: No leave recorded — every active driver is in the dispatch pool.
drivers.addLeaveValidation: Pick a driver and at least the start date.
drivers.addLeaveFailed: Could not add the leave entry.
drivers.removeBody: Remove {{name}}'s leave ({{range}})? The driver goes straight back into the dispatch pool for those dates.
drivers.removeFailed: Could not remove the leave entry.
drivers.createValidation: Fill in name, phone, employee number, a password (6+ chars) and department.
drivers.noFreeTrucks: No free trucks. Add one, or free a departed driver's truck first.
drivers.retireBody: Retire {{name}}? They can no longer log in. Their truck is not freed automatically — unassign it above so it can be reassigned.
drivers.statusRetiredNote: This account is disabled — the driver cannot log in.
drivers.activeTripBlock: This driver has an active trip. Complete or reassign it first.

trucks.createValidation: Plate, type, capacity and both claim rates are required.
trucks.ratesNote: Claim rates and document expiries are edited from their own screens.
trucks.retireBody: Retire {{plate}}? It leaves the dispatch pool and its driver (if any) is freed for reassignment. Trip and fuel history is kept — reactivate anytime.
trucks.activeTripBlock: This truck is on an active trip. Complete or reassign it first.
trucks.noFuel: No fuel logged this month yet.
trucks.valLitres: Litres must be a positive number.
trucks.valCost: Cost (RM) must be a positive number.
trucks.valOdometer: Odometer (km) must be a positive number.
trucks.logSaveFailed: Could not save the fuel log.

reports.consolidationEstNote: Fewer-trips is exact; fuel and CO₂ are estimated from average trip distance.
reports.payrollSub: Click a driver for per-trip detail

incentives.auditBanner: Every rate change is recorded in the audit log. Source of truth: UWC Internal Lorry Rate (Development Brief §3).
incentives.resetTitle: Reset truck rates to UWC spec?
incentives.resetBody: Reset all truck rates to UWC spec defaults? This overwrites current rate values (weekday & weekend claim, daily deduction, max load) for all trucks with the authoritative values from docs/uwc-spec.json. Audit-logged. Rate values take effect tomorrow (MYT); max load applies immediately.
incentives.stagingWarning: Rate changes take effect tomorrow (MYT) — today's assignments and running trips keep today's rates.
incentives.pointsStagingWarning: Point changes take effect tomorrow (MYT) — today's assignments and running trips keep today's points.
incentives.zoneWideNote: Applies to every location in the zone.
incentives.holidaysLoadError: Could not load the holiday calendar.
incentives.holidayBanner: Trips picked up on a listed date pay the off-peak rate all day.
incentives.holidayValidation: Both the date and the holiday name are required.
incentives.removeHolidayBody: Remove {{name}} ({{date}}) from the calendar? Trips picked up that day will pay the normal weekday rate instead of the off-peak rate. Already-completed trips keep their finalized pay. Audit-logged.
incentives.formulaLine2Post: on the first trip of the day
rules: Each truck has its own weekday and weekend/holiday claim rate.
Destination points reflect distance — further zones earn more.
Weekend & public-holiday trips use the higher off-peak rate.
The daily deduction applies once, on the first trip of the day.
Subsequent same-day trips are not deducted again.
All amounts are computed server-side by the incentive engine.

trips.noAttention: No trips need attention right now — every pending booking has been placed.
trips.selectPrompt: Select a trip to view details and dispatch.
trips.conflictLine: {{who}} has another trip at {{when}}, within the conflict window of this pickup.
trips.permitOverrideNote: Overriding is audit-logged; update the date on the Trucks page once renewed.
trips.showingDrivers: Showing available drivers (capacity ≥ {{count}} pallets highlighted as a fit).
trips.onLeaveDate: On leave for this pickup date
trips.externalBody: Outsource booking {{ticket}} to {{company}}{{rate}}? The booking leaves the internal fleet and no driver incentive applies.
trips.cancelBody: Cancel booking {{ticket}}? The requestor keeps the record, but the trip will not be dispatched. This cannot be undone.
trips.abortBody: Abort trip {{ticket}}? Use this only when the driver can't finish it (e.g. they've departed). The trip is cancelled and the truck is freed for dispatch; the driver is not paid for it (an aborted trip doesn't finalize). Any remaining drops must be re-booked. This cannot be undone.
trips.unassignBody: Remove {{name}} from trip {{ticket}}? The trip returns to Pending and re-enters the dispatch flow (auto-dispatch may pick it up again). The driver will be notified.
trips.reassignIntro: Currently assigned to {{name}}{{plate}}. Pick the new driver — the same dispatch checks apply.
trips.moveBody: Move trip {{ticket}} from {{from}} to {{to}} ({{plate}})? {{from}} will be notified the trip was removed.
trips.rateVaries: Rate varies (trip spans two pay days)
trips.noBreakdown: Breakdown not recorded (trip completed before per-drop pay history was kept).
